text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the spring Tenno Sho. T.M. Opera O, with
otherworldly presence, declares the beginning of
a new chapter to the fierce competition there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega has no intentions of getting
involved in the theatrics, but she won't give up
the starring role either.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She heads off, ready to go against T.M. Opera O
and Narita Top Road in this spring showdown.
